project: MTD Ontology – Expert Reference (Le Bouteiller compliant, phase-aware)

terminal dispersion.label: terminal dispersion
terminal dispersion.description: Late-stage process related to final spreading / distal evolution.

flow behavior: elastic.label: flow behavior: elastic
flow behavior: elastic.description: Transversal causal control impacting multiple MTD surfaces and facies.

compaction during burial.label: compaction during burial
compaction during burial.description: Post-depositional process affecting seismic expression and thickness evolution.

initial aspect ratio and top of mass slo.label: initial aspect ratio and top of mass slope angle

posterior fluid migrations.label: posterior fluid migrations
posterior fluid migrations.description: Post-depositional process potentially modifying seismic attributes and facies expression.

thrust fault angle increase to toe.label: thrust fault angle increase to toe

lithology of underlying material in sour.label: lithology of underlying material in source zone

pore pressure increase by fluid migratio.label: pore pressure increase by fluid migration
